title: SASC Advances Nomination of Hon. Melissa...
description: The Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 1,995 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air Force,...
text:
The Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 1,995 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air Force, and Marine Corps.
The Committee also voted 14-10 to report out favorably the nomination of the Honorable Melissa G. Dalton to be Under Secretary of the Air Force.
The nominations were immediately reported to the Senate Floor following the Committee’s action.
